links.example: Read our latest [AI Coding Tutorial](https://sprocoder.com/ai-tutorial) for deep learning guidelines.

youtube_embed_instructions.input_type: YouTube Embed iframe or URL link
how_to_get_embed_code: 1. Go to any YouTube video in your browser.
2. Click the 'Share' button beneath the video.
4. Copy the entire HTML block starting with '<iframe ...></iframe>'.
5. Paste this iframe code directly into the YouTube segment inside the Admin Dashboard.
youtube_embed_instructions.video_limit: Supports displaying up to 5 custom videos on the home page left panel.

website_branding_setup.behavior: When you upload your logo or icon inside the Pages section of the Admin Dashboard, it gets hosted on ImgBB, and the live link is automatically saved to 'settings/logoIconUrl' in the Firebase Realtime Database. The entire header, footer, and mobile drawer logos update in real time.

ai_generation_prompt: Create a fully functional React/TypeScript CMS Admin Dashboard component styled with Tailwind CSS Frosted Glass theme. The component must include: 1) Authentication panel using Email & Password or a 4-digit security PIN; 2) Tabs for 'Articles' (create, edit with title, category, thumbnail upload, rich text Markdown editor supporting word links and embedded images, delete); 3) 'Categories' (manage list of up to 10 unique tech tags); 4) 'YouTube Feed' (edit links/embed iframe codes for 1-5 videos displayed on home); 5) 'Pages Editor' (edit dynamic content for About, Privacy, Terms, and upload brand logo via ImgBB API); and 6) Real-time database sync using Firebase onValue/set hooks.
